form.formComment: Talented type with an excellent strike rate at this journey. Has been prominent in the run and duly saluted at his last couple, most recently over 380m at this track in a handy 21.87 beating Mizuki Starline. Yet to be beaten in two starts out of this box. Sure to go well.

form.formComment: Last start finished last over 380m at this track beaten 28 lengths (23.74) behind Jimmy Jax in a Grade 4 on March 24. Has clocked a superb 21.71 Best Time here at the trip. Top chance.

form.formComment: Good effort at double-figure odds last time when third (22.08) over 380m at this track. Drawn close to the inside. Has ability and should run well.

form.formComment: Bounced back last start after failing to finish two starts back when she finished 3rd on April 7 over 380m at this track behind Assassino beaten 5.5 lengths (22.30) in a Grade 5. Likely to struggle this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked at the end of the back straight and lost ground.

form.formComment: Form has been solid with minor placings at his last four starts. Last time out finished 2nd on April 2 over 380m at this track behind Lenard Clyde beaten 7 lengths (22.07) in a Grade 5. Looking to others this time.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but prior to that was in the money twice in a row including a narrow loss at big odds two back when second over 380m at this track. Has to overcome a wide draw and will need to find best.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at this track over 380m in 22.09. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when eighth over 380m at this track at Restricted WIN level. Can bounce back. One of the main chances.

form.formComment: Racing well without winning, recording four minors on end, the latest hitting the ground running with a fast early sectional but finishing in the minors again when third (29.02) over 498m at this track. Solid formlines coming through that last run. Looks a major player.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage sixth last time out over 380m at this track. Others make more appeal.
